summary: Phase 5 (round 2): reconciled docs with the lock-based lid behavior after round-2 research falsified the round-1 'mutter blanks the panel, ignore is sufficient' rationale and the config changed ignore->lock in commit d82e669. docs/gnome-settings.md Lid-Close Behavior subsection now states both logind values as 'lock', describes lock-then-panel-off-~30s (gsd-power screensaver blank) blank-but-awake behavior, credits gsd-power's handle-lid-switch block inhibitor (plus HandleLidSwitchDocked default ignore) for unchanged docked behavior, and its inhibitor Note now correctly says sleep inhibitors never affect the lid action (LidSwitchIgnoreInhibited=yes default) and govern idle-suspend only; the battery bag-warning bullet is retained. docs/niri.md lid paragraph corrected from 'ignored at logind' to the lock action, noting niri natively toggles the internal monitor with the lid and swayidle's lock handler covers the lock signal. docs/configuration.md:33 left alone (generic, accurate). Grep across docs/ found no other stale 'ignore'/mutter-blanks claims. Round-2 addendum appended to summaries/01 (falsification, d82e669 ignore->lock, docs reconciled, busctl check now expects 'lock'). Verification: nix flake check 'all checks passed!'; nixos-rebuild build --flake .#hamsa succeeded. Committed as d558c6b (3 files only; concurrent-session churn excluded). Activation (Phase 4) still pending user sudo.

artifacts.summary: Lid-Close Behavior subsection and inhibitor Note reconciled: HandleLidSwitch*=lock values, lock-then-blank (~30s) mechanism, gsd-power docked inhibitor, LidSwitchIgnoreInhibited=yes inhibitor nuance; battery warning retained
Post-swayidle lid paragraph corrected: logind lid action is lock (not ignored); niri natively toggles the internal monitor with the lid; swayidle lock handler covers the lock signal
Round-2 addendum appended: round-1 assumption falsified, ignore->lock in commit d82e669, docs reconciled, activation-check expectation updated to 'lock'
Round-2 research (pre-existing): mutter 50.2 source proof that ignore alone leaves the undocked panel on; basis for the lock revision and this doc reconciliation

continuation_context: Config (power.nix at lock, commit d82e669) and all docs now agree with the round-2 findings. state.json status intentionally left 'partial': Phase 4 activation requires interactive sudo. USER steps: (1) sudo nixos-rebuild switch --flake .#hamsa; (2) busctl get-property org.freedesktop.login1 /org/freedesktop/login1 org.freedesktop.login1.Manager HandleLidSwitch -> expect s "lock" (restart systemd-logind if stale); (3) follow the safe activation/test procedure in reports/02_lid-close-screen-off-mechanism.md (dock-attached lid test before undocked test; canary process instead of live agents for the first undocked test). Open user decision from report 02 remains: keep 15-min battery idle-suspend vs sleep-inactive-battery-type=nothing.
blockers: Phase 4 activation requires interactive sudo (sudo nixos-rebuild switch --flake .#hamsa); the implementing agent's sudo access is denied by the permission system
next_steps: User activates with sudo nixos-rebuild switch --flake .#hamsa, verifies HandleLidSwitch=lock via busctl, and runs the report-02 safe lid tests; then task 117 can be marked completed
